title: Delegation Credential (DC)
description: Signed document authorizing one party to act on behalf of another, with scope and time constraints. See SPEC.md §4.4. The attenuation rule (scope MUST be subset of parent) and root_operator invariant are enforced at verification time, not by this schema.

issued_by.description: The delegator. Either an AXIS operator ID or an AXIS agent ID. If an agent ID, parent_credential_id is REQUIRED.

issued_to.description: The delegate. An AXIS agent ID, or a foreign DID (did:key, did:web, did:ethr, did:peer, etc.) per §4.4 cross-system delegation.

root_operator.description: Root operator at the top of the delegation chain. MUST be byte-for-byte identical across all credentials in a chain (root-operator invariant). Verifiers enforce this.

parent_credential_id.description: Credential that authorized the delegator. REQUIRED when issued_by is an agent (not the root operator).

scope.description: Permitted actions. MUST be equal to or a subset of the parent credential's scope (attenuation rule). v0.1 does not constrain scope string format.

constraints.description: Additional limits. Semantics are out-of-band. Known fields below; others permitted.

max_sub_delegation_depth.description: Maximum additional sub-delegation levels permitted. 0 forbids sub-delegation.

created.description: ISO 8601 timestamp (UTC) when the credential was issued.

expires.description: ISO 8601 timestamp (UTC) after which the credential is no longer valid.

revocable.description: Whether the credential can be revoked before expiry. Defaults to true.

revocation_url.description: Where to check revocation status for this specific credential.

proof.description: Cryptographic proof per W3C Data Integrity.

verificationMethod.description: DID URL of the key used to sign (e.g. did:axis:prime:mira-voss#key-1).
